DA_CooldownAbility_BioAbilityData.Name: Cooldown
DA_CooldownAbility_BioAbilityData.Description: Ability prints a string and applies cooldown.

DA_FastUrology_BioAbilityData.Name: Fast Urology
DA_FastUrology_BioAbilityData.Description: You consume water at double the rate.

DA_SmallStomach_BioAbilityData.Name: Small Stomach
DA_SmallStomach_BioAbilityData.Description: Your maximum hunger value is decreased by 25.

DA_Hemophiliac_BioAbilityData.Name: Hemophiliac
DA_Hemophiliac_BioAbilityData.Description: When damaged you take an additional 2 health loss every second for 10s. 30s cooldown

DA_JelliedLegs_BioAbilityData.Name: Jellied Legs
DA_JelliedLegs_BioAbilityData.Description: Swim 25% slower for 8s after submerging. 30s cooldown

DA_Maladapted_DeepStart_BioAbilityData.Name: Maladapted
DA_Maladapted_DeepStart_BioAbilityData.Description: Your body needs human sources of food, water and air.

DA_GelatinousSkin_BioAbilityData.Name: Gelatinous Skin
DA_GelatinousSkin_BioAbilityData.Description: When you take damage you are vulnerable, taking an additional 15% damage from all sources for 10s. 60s cooldown.

DA_SoHungry_BioAbilityData.Name: So Hungry
DA_SoHungry_BioAbilityData.Description: You consume food at double the rate.

DA_HeatResistance_BioAbilityData.Name: Heat Resistance
DA_HeatResistance_BioAbilityData.Description: On enter heat gain Mild Heat Resistance

DA_Regeneration_BioAbilityData.Name: Regeneration
DA_Regeneration_BioAbilityData.Description: If damaged you heal 15 health every 15 seconds.

DA_CopperFinder_BioAbilityData.Name: Copper Finder
DA_CopperFinder_BioAbilityData.Description: When close to copper, highlight any copper that is near

DA_RestoreOxygenOnDash_BioAbilityData.Name: Pseudo Gills
DA_RestoreOxygenOnDash_BioAbilityData.Description: Dash restores a small amount of oxygen.

DA_CreatureFollowOnEatOrDrink_BioAbility.Name: Food Bank
DA_CreatureFollowOnEatOrDrink_BioAbility.Description: Eat or drink to pacify & lure creatures

DA_PowerfulKicks_BioAbilityData.Name: Powerful Kicks
DA_PowerfulKicks_BioAbilityData.Description: Swim faster for a short period after submerging

DA_RestoreHealthOnOxygenated_BioAbilityD.Name: Regenerative Breath
DA_RestoreHealthOnOxygenated_BioAbilityD.Description: You regenerate some health whenever you consume oxygen.

DA_InvisibleOnDash_BioAbilityData.Name: Invisible Dash
DA_InvisibleOnDash_BioAbilityData.Description: Become invisible to creatures for a while after dashing

DA_GoldFinder_BioAbilityData.Name: Gold Finder
DA_GoldFinder_BioAbilityData.Description: When close to gold, highlight any gold that is near

DA_IncreaseScanRepair_BioAbilityData.Name: Coolant Exhalation
DA_IncreaseScanRepair_BioAbilityData.Description: Substantially increase Scan and Repair speed

DA_HeatResistanceMediumOxygenPlant_BioAb.Name: Oxygenated Heat Resistance
DA_HeatResistanceMediumOxygenPlant_BioAb.Description: Gain Substantial Heat Resistance from Oxygen Plants

DA_RestoreWaterWithinHeat_BioAbilityData.Name: Restore Water in Heat
DA_RestoreWaterWithinHeat_BioAbilityData.Description: Increase max water and restore in heat

DA_DivingReflex_BioAbilityData.Name: Diving Reflex
DA_DivingReflex_BioAbilityData.Description: Whenever you run out of Oxygen, you are rapidly shot upwards for a short duration

DA_ShockProof_BioAbilityData.Name: Shock Proof
DA_ShockProof_BioAbilityData.Description: While in movement, you are immune to electrical damage

DA_TidalDefenses_BioAbilityData.Name: Tidal Defense
DA_TidalDefenses_BioAbilityData.Description: Afering Current, take nearly no damage for a while

DA_EatPlantMatterForSustenance_BioAbilit.Name: Plant Based
DA_EatPlantMatterForSustenance_BioAbilit.Description: Consume plant matter for food and water

DA_SuitGills_BioAbilityData.Name: Suit Gills
DA_SuitGills_BioAbilityData.Description: When your oxygen gets below 30 you regenerate O2 at a rate of 5/s for 5s. 60s cooldown

DA_HeldResourceFinder_BioAbilityData.Name: Litholfactory Sense
DA_HeldResourceFinder_BioAbilityData.Description: Hold a mineral to sense more of it

DA_CurrentExitBoost_BioAbilityData.Name: Current Exit Boost
DA_CurrentExitBoost_BioAbilityData.Description: When leaving  a Current, increase move speed significantly for 5s. 20s cooldown.

DA_InvisibleOnStop_BioAbilityData.Name: Invisible
DA_InvisibleOnStop_BioAbilityData.Description: Become invisible to creatures for a while after stopping

DA_PowerfulKicks_CaveVariant_BioAbilityD.Name: Powerful Kicks - Cave Variant
DA_PowerfulKicks_CaveVariant_BioAbilityD.Description: Swim faster for a short period after  getting oxygen from an Oxygen Plant

DA_GrabInRadius_BioAbilityData.Name: Dash Grab
DA_GrabInRadius_BioAbilityData.Description: On dash, harvest in a large radius

DA_OxygenReprieve_ExtremeTemp_BioAbility.Name: Temperature Reprieve
DA_OxygenReprieve_ExtremeTemp_BioAbility.Description: Do not consume oxygen in extreme temperature

DA_CurrentRider_BioAbilityData.Name: Current Rider
DA_CurrentRider_BioAbilityData.Description: When entering a current, increase move speed significantly for a little while.

DA_NightVision_BioAbilityData.Name: Enhanced Pupils
DA_NightVision_BioAbilityData.Description: Activate night vision while holding a mineral

DA_HeavyGills_BioAbilityData.Name: Heavy Gills
DA_HeavyGills_BioAbilityData.Description: Consume less oxygen while swimming in currents.

DA_OxygenReprieve_BioAbilityData.Name: Oxygen Reprieve
DA_OxygenReprieve_BioAbilityData.Description: When getting oxygen from an Oxygen Plant, do not consume oxygen for a short period

DA_PressurizedLungs_BioAbilityData.Name: Pressurized Lungs
DA_PressurizedLungs_BioAbilityData.Description: You are immune to breathing penalties encountered below 100m.

DA_SilverFinder_BioAbilityData.Name: Silver Finder
DA_SilverFinder_BioAbilityData.Description: When close to silver, highlight any silver that is near

DA_GuaranteedTitanium_BioAbilityData.Name: Titanium Generator
DA_GuaranteedTitanium_BioAbilityData.Description: Add 1 titanium to inventory if not already in inventory

DA_ChargeBatteryOnSurface_BioAbilityData.Name: Battery Charger
DA_ChargeBatteryOnSurface_BioAbilityData.Description: While not submerged, recharge the held tool's battery

DA_DiveOnSubmerge_BioAbilityData.Name: Deep Dive
DA_DiveOnSubmerge_BioAbilityData.Description: On submerge, dive rapidly for a short period

DA_ChitinLayer_BioAbilityData.Name: Chitin Layer
DA_ChitinLayer_BioAbilityData.Description: Take half damage from hostile lifeforms

DA_AquaticReserves_BioAbilityData.Name: Aquatic Reserves
DA_AquaticReserves_BioAbilityData.Description: If your Thirst reaches 0 you gain 10 Thirst. 20s cooldown

DA_PlanktonBreathing_BioAbilityData.Name: Plankton Breathing
DA_PlanktonBreathing_BioAbilityData.Description: You can breathe plankton (present in water currentrs).

DA_PrismaticShell_ItemType.ItemDescription: [PLACEHOLDER] A hard shell with shifting hues.

DA_AxumRelic_ItemType.ItemDescription: [PLACEHOLDER] A relic of the Axum society.

Biosuit upgrade module.

Prevents damage from extreme high temperatures in the "Level 1" range.

DA_BiobedMesh_DatabankEntry.EntryText: This should not appear. Bug it if you see it.

DA_AirKelp_DatabankEntry.EntryText: [PLACEHOLDER] Airy, fluffy, looks like goop you just want to lick. And you can!

DA_EyeballSponge_DatabankEntry.EntryText:
[PLACEHOLDER ] Eyeball Sponge

You deserve it. Break into the closet and get that yum food.

DA_CymaticPool_DatabankEntry.EntryText: [PLACEHOLDER] A pool of liquid metal. If you're tired of swimming in good old boring waters, you know what to do here.

DA_AxumWriting_TailingsGraffiti_01b_Data.EntryText: [PLACEHOLDER] This is probably not a love letter...or is it?

DA_ThermalGenerator_Core_DatabankEntry.EntryText: [PLACEHOLDER] Its power source is broken but it could be hooked back up again. And now you can build it too!

DA_PuddingUrchin_DatabankEntry.EntryText: Pudding Urchin, or Urchin Pudding. It will hurt. But you'll remember the taste.

DA_AirFruit_DatabankEntry.EntryText: [PLACEHOLDER] Is it air or is it liquid? Is it both? You never knew a cyst could taste this soft and fluffy. You might never have thought about eating a cyst...and yet, here you are.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: [DNL] Print lost to inert gas asphyxia. Reprinting.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Contact. Alterra starship wreck detected.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: [DNL] Xenon poisoning critical. Seek filtered air from a base or oxygen tank.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: "I see lights. It might be a Cicada wreck. I'm going to check it out."

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: A similar beacon is embedded in your body.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Silver is a mainstay feedstock for electronics.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: The rebreather scrubs carbon dioxide from exhaled air, recycling wasted oxygen for re-use.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: [DNL] Print lost to heavy metal poisoning. Reprinting.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: The Wakemaker is a marine adaptation of the Spacemaker EVA thrust pistol system. Travelers should be careful to rest their wrist, elbows and shoulders during prolonged use.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Alert received. See a NoA terminal as soon as possible.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Noetic Advisor alerts will be tracked on your HUD.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: "We shouldn't have come here. We're too far out. We're way too far out."

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This project will require massive amounts of raw material. This power station likely did, too. Recommend seeking out external means to accelerate gathering in nearby biomes.
Lines.Comment: I am removing this because this responds to scanner v1, but we are triggering off scanner v2 - Tim

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Biomass is a generic resource full of DNA stuff from multiple organisms, among which but not limited to: grass, sand, kitchen utensils, sulfuric acid, plastic bags.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Don't give up. NoA won't let you die. You must surface or be trapped forever.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: Line 1

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: Line 2

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: [DNL] Warning: Passing 100 meters. Oxygen efficiency decreased.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: You got a biosampler!

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Nickel should not be spawning in the world yet.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Something is wrong

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Loss investigation complete. Cause identified. Need I say more?

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Celestine needs writing

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: "Placing the repeater. Stand by. I've got activity on sonar."

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This dialogue uses a story event to trigger a story goal unlock

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This dialogue uses a story event to trigger a notification

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This dialogue was triggered by a story event triggered by another dialogue

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This dialogue uses a story event to trigger another dialogue

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This dialogue uses a story event to trigger a tag story event unlock

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This is dialogue triggered directly for all current players

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: Because it was triggered multicast using a world->player SG chain

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_TestSpeaker.DA_TestSpeaker
Lines.SpokenText: This is dialogue triggered directly for the triggering player

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Translation Failed.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting sister unit on shortwave. Someone else survived.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Survival checklist. Mark your location with a flare and dye pack.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting no sister units. We are alone.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Flare and dye pack…check. Have you done this before?

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: You cannot die here. We have worlds to conquer!

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Emergency suit eject in three…two…one…

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Player.DA_Character_Player
Lines.SpokenText: [character specific yes]

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Emergency suit eject in three…two…one…

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: In addition to its use as a basic electrical conductor, copper has antimicrobial properties, making it safe and enjoyable to lick.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This umbilical is flexible and hollow. It contains several insulated power or data cables.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Noa.DA_Character_Noa
Lines.SpokenText: Greetings.  I am Noa.  The Noetic advisor.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting no sister units. We are alone.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Survival checklist. We are breathing. Core temperature safe. Blood pressure safe.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Your jaghun teammates may be searching for you. Mark your position with your dye pack and flare.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting sister unit on shortwave. She is wearing another survivor.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Survival checklist. We are breathing. Core temperature safe. Blood pressure safe.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Flare and dye pack deployed. Have you done this before?

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: EVA suit flooding.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Request body consent for emergency suit eject.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Player.DA_Character_Player
Lines.SpokenText: [character specific yes]

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Emergency suit eject in three…two…one…

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Frustrated broken PDA cannot analyze scans correctly.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Build new computer core please. Computer core help analyze scans for survive.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Scanner tool. Low-field magnetic resonance imaging of organisms and technology. Scans become databank things. Useful scans become fabricator things.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: PDA broken. Ashamed. Survive build new computer soon please. New computer help survive.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: New computer help share data with other survives.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Suit network broken. Need scanner!

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Survive please. Make scanner. Scan suit. Scan rock. Scan fish. Scan PDA. Scan survive. Scan scan.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Habitat air good. Nitrox one atmosphere. Breathe drink eat sleep safely.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Suit transmitters offline. Unable to connect.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Scanner required.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: User should build a computer that has not suffered severe radiation damage. Consult your builder tool's library.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: A computer core can help pool data with other survivors.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This shelter meets Khanate survival criteria. As long as there is power, you may confidently breathe, rest, and work here.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: The scanner tool is a low-field MRI. Use it to image organisms and technology for analysis. Remember y your ancestors survived upon perfect knowledge of the mare: its feed, its milk, its blood.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Behold! Machiavelli creates that demon Belphegor upon this world, to court thee with knowledge and invention!

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: I'm sorry. My persona is unstable. User should immediately build a clean computer core to analyze scan data.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: A ger needs a fabricator. Will body build a fabricator?

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Fabricator feeds and equips body. Find or build a fabricator.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: First fab use! PLACEHOLDER

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Skin tastes no xenon. Body can rest on biobed. Biobed saves hurt body.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Player.DA_Character_Player
Lines.SpokenText: [character specific yes]

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Emergency suit eject in three…two…one…

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Skin assuming control of PDA functions.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Warning. EVA suit flooding. Skin needs body consent for emergency suit eject.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: A new world...

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Advise body: deploy flare and dye pack. Jaghun teammates may be searching for you.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting sister skin on shortwave. She is wearing another survivor.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting no sister skins. We are alone.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Alert! Bioactive levels of xenon gas. Source unknown. Prognosis for long term exposure: permanent body sedation and death.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Advise body: equip habitat builder. Erect a ger and produce clean breathing air.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: A new world...

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Rescue signals already deployed. Commendable.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Sampling. Breathable nitrogen-oxygen atmosphere. 818 parts per million carbon dioxide.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Request trace gas spectrography.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Noa.DA_Character_Noa
Lines.SpokenText: Most required scans uploaded. Five total scans of living organisms required.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Noa.DA_Character_Noa
Lines.SpokenText: Initial scans uploaded. Five scans of living organisms required.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: The scanner tool uses low-field magnetic resonance to image organisms and technology. Tools you discover will be added to your fabricator library.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: A new world...

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Rescue signals already deployed. Commendable.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Detecting no sister skins on shortwave. We are alone.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Our continued survival indicates an oxygen-nitrogen atmosphere. Request laser spectrometry of trace gases. [ping prompt]

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Your EVA suit is flooding. Request consent for emergency suit eject.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Body nonresponsive. Determination: body is understandably reluctant to enter alien ocean.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Take courage, body. I am with you. Eject in three...two...one...

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_Khutulun.DA_Character_Khutulun
Lines.SpokenText: Healthy nitrox gas mix: verified. You have completed Self-Triage Steps 1 and 2: Airway and Breathing.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Sphere age circa two hundred years. Composition: titanium palladium alloy. The sensor masts suggest an early digital civilization.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: The sphere is hollow.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Modal structure age: twelve hundred years. Granite blocks coated in electroformed silicon bronze. There are signs of a gold outer skin, since removed.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: The use of electroforming implies the builders generated and used electrical power.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This component is an electronic computer of alien origin. Even with power, we will need a full-scale computer core to understand its architecture.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: It is not the Minggatu.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: It is not the alien probe.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Origin unknown.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This component is a flexible tether between the tower and the sphere. It is only two hundred years old and clearly hollow.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This substructure is a set of racks for unknown organisms to rest. Sizes range from small seal to right whale.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This central structure is an orrery depicting the major bodies of an unknown star system. The surrounding wires might represent nearby stars.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This antechamber is curious mix of ancient coral-concrete construction and early electronic displays.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This outbuilding is a machine room at least a thousand years old. The generator within had no obvious fuel source.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: This object is a reflecting telescope for observing the heavens. The mirror is made of polished silver rather than glass.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: A telegraph station with a wireless radio aerial. Perhaps the aerial once reached above the ocean surface.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Bearing: southwest.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Heading: northeast.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Bearing: southeast.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Bearing: direct north.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Heading: northeast.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Bearing: direct south.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Magnetic anomaly detected. Possible Minggatu crash site.

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
Lines.SpokenText: Bearing: east.

DA_BP_Observatory_MushroomEntrance_Datab.EntryText: A single plug of polished coral surfaced with concrete, age circa one thousand years. It can be raised or lowered on a column to permit entry into the space below. The mechanism is corroded.

DA_Observatory_MainGates_DatabankEntry.EntryText:
Heavy stone gates.

Like most materials without fabrication rights management technology, they cannot be deconstructed with a builder tool.

DA_Observatory_EntranceTerminal_Databank.EntryText:
This is unpowered. It's likely tied to the iridescent looking door blocking access to the inside of the structure. 

Recommendation  - Look around for a power generating station.

DA_NoA_WelcomeCenter_FindOtherSites.ResponseText: "If no one is there to meet you, you can use the sonic modem to ping the main habitat. Sorry for the inconvenience!"

DA_NoA_WelcomeCenter_WhatDoIDo.ResponseText:
"Our community needs and welcomes new workers! As long as NoA keeps you in print, you'll help explore, build, and study this beautiful - and unexpected - new planet!"

"If you're a reprint, you may be able to step into a trade practiced by an earlier fork of your identity. Speak with the kurul council once you're settled in at Habitat."

DA_NoA_WelcomeCenter_Underwater.ResponseText:
ACKNOWLEDGE USER EXPERIENCE FEEDBACK 
RECOMMEND CARDIOVASCULAR EXERCISE

DA_NoA_WelcomeCenter_WhereIsEveryone.ResponseText: "Colonists are building a future at worksites around the region, or resting and relaxing in the main habitat to the northwest. You can reach them by radio mast or hardline!"

DA_NoA_WelcomeCenter_WrongPlanet.ResponseText:
"This is a complicated topic, best handled in person. 

For now, it's important to know that we refer to this world as PROTEUS."

DA_NoA_DeepCave_WhereIsEveryone.ResponseText:
NINE (9) COLONISTS CHECKED IN PRIOR TO DEEP CAVE SORTIE

LAST KNOWN BLACKBOX POSITION UPLOADED

DA_NoA_DeepCave_KurulKeyPurpose.ResponseText:
THIS KEY AUTHORIZES ACCESS TO TADPOLE PENS

POSITIONAL SIGNAL UPLOADED

DA_Noa_Default_Placeholder_FoundCopper.ResponseText: [Placeholder] This is just an example of NoA's radio functionality...

DA_NoA_TadpolePens_Q10_GoodbyeSophie.ResponseText: <Fatal error. Out of memory. Vivarium halted.>

DA_NoA_TadpolePens_Q10_WhoAmI.ResponseText: <Fatal error. Out of memory. Vivarium halted.>

DA_NoA_TadpolePens_Q3_StopWhat.ResponseText: She's going to kill everyone. Wipe out the colony. Wipe out any chance we have on Proteus, forever.God. What if we're the last ones? Does she hate people that completely?

DA_NoA_TadpolePens_Q10_IHaveMoreQuestion.ResponseText: <Fatal error. Out of memory. Vivarium halted.>

DA_NoA_TadpolePens_Q10_IfNahemaHasMasefi.InputText: If Nahema has Masefield, why would she kill the tree?
DA_NoA_TadpolePens_Q10_IfNahemaHasMasefi.ResponseText: <Fatal error. Out of memory. Vivarium halted.>

DA_NoA_TadpolePens_SeriouslyWhatProtecte.ResponseText: THIS TERMINAL HAS BEEN ASKED TO DELIVER THE FOLLOWING STATEMENT: "Please, stop. Didn't you say it yourself? 'No heroic measures.' If you can apply it to a colleague, you can apply it to a species. Us or them. We made our mistakes. Let's die with dignity."

DA_NoA_SubPens_Placeholder.ResponseText: [PLACEHOLDER] Welcome Back Sophie OR Nahema OR DONT FOLLOW ME!

DA_NoA_SubPens_NoKeyState_Placeholder.ResponseText: [PLACEHOLDER] You don't have Kurul class key. Go away.

DA_WPResource_Lithium_ClamthuluPearl.DeveloperNote: note that display text here is internal only. These respawn since they're organically made inside clamthulus.

DA_Investigation_Anita_Trigger_CoralGard.DeveloperNote:
BG - intent is, when the player is first made aware of their digestion maladaptation, start a timer to begin the Anita investigation (which helps you find the stomach adaptation.)

Timer implemented in "first surface" SG - DA_Storygoal_Player_Ch2_FirstTimeAtSurface_StoryGoal

Lines.Speaker: /Game/Data/Narrative/Dialogue/SpeakingCharacters/DA_Character_BrokenPDA.DA_Character_BrokenPDA
